author: coordinator-3
authorized_by: coordination-directive 2026-07-08 (clean the remaining recipe defect before recording the GNG-0 signature); tracker item kernel-of-truth-qip; registrar acting as coordinator-3, completing correction wave c-2026-07-08 (wave 2: f2/g2/g3/g8/g9)
changes: corpus pins ONLY: pins.corpus_hashes._recipe replaced by the current kot-corpus-hash/1 recipe string (kot_common.CORPUS_RECIPE) and the non-placeholder digests recomputed from the committed data/<corpus>/ trees at re-freeze time for: kernel-v0, math-lean-sample, math-mm, math-v0; PINNED-AT-INPUTS placeholders carried over verbatim (still awaiting their pre-declared ops amendments before any final-phase run)

no other field of the record was changed: hypotheses, design, endpoints, verdict rules, analysis-script/doc pins, budget, kill criterion and extrapolation envelope are byte-identical to the superseded freeze (frozen_at/frozen_by restamped by prereg-freeze as required)
corpus_pin_defect: Corpus pins regenerated under kot-corpus-hash/1 (tools/registry/corpus-pin.py; recipe string embedded in pins.corpus_hashes._recipe). The GNG-0-seed digests did not reproduce under their own stated recipe in ~40 literal interpretations (pin-GENERATION defect surfaced by the F1 exploratory run seq 0, pins_observed block; corpus files were git-clean throughout — no data drift). prereg-freeze now recomputes every non-placeholder corpus digest at freeze time and refuses mismatches (ERR_P2_CORPUS_PIN); registry-check gained a --corpus-pins check.
kill_criterion_status: kill criterion verbatim text UNCHANGED (byte-identical to the superseded freeze)
legitimacy: Lawful pre-registration correction, NOT a post-hoc amendment: at correction time GNG-0 had NOT been maintainer-signature-recorded (registry/gng0-signoff.json did not exist; frozen-index _meta records external timestamping as deferred) and the experiment's results-log contained NO run record of any phase (results-log/<id>.jsonl does not exist for any of f2/g2/g3/g8/g9). The P-9 design-amendment cutoff (first final-phase run) was therefore not crossed. The provisional freeze was reset to DRAFT, ONLY the corpus-pin block was corrected, and the record was re-frozen through prereg-freeze under the same tooling lints plus the freeze-time corpus-pin verification introduced by wave c-2026-07-08. The four records with final-phase runs (f1/m0b/g6/g7) were NOT touched — their freezes are immutable.
